mechanism_narrative: A rising 3-month trend in real activity-sensitive retail sales indicates stronger household demand and improving corporate revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:RSAFS
fact:RSAFS vintage value for 2017-11 was 492717 before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce a positive 20-day return spread versus lower-growth observations in walk-forward tests, or if Rank IC is below 0.03 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate rises to a new trailing 24-month high, the higher discount-rate shock reduces equity valuation multiples and predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above its trailing 24-month high
evidence_refs: series:FEDFUNDS
fact:FEDFUNDS vintage value for 2017-11 was 1.16 before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases and no negative mean excess return versus non-triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: When unemployment is low but payroll growth decelerates, the economy is in a late-cycle labor slowdown that compresses earnings expectations, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE below 4.5% and PAYEMS 3-month growth below its trailing 12-month average
evidence_refs: series:UNRATE
series:PAYEMS
fact:UNRATE vintage value for 2017-11 was 4.1 before the decision date
fact:PAYEMS vintage value for 2017-11 was 147241 before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if the joint low-unemployment and payroll-deceleration trigger is followed by positive 60-day returns in more than 60% of triggered cases or if the interaction term has nonnegative walk-forward coefficient.

mechanism_narrative: A positive 6-month industrial production trend signals expanding output and operating leverage for cyclical firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:INDPRO
fact:INDPRO vintage value for 2017-11 was 106.3969 before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if positive 6-month INDPRO momentum fails to deliver higher 60-day S&P 500 returns than negative momentum in walk-forward tests, or if the return spread is statistically indistinguishable from zero at p > 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: When CPI inflation accelerates while the funds rate is already rising, investors price a higher probability of restrictive policy, reducing equity multiples and producing negative 20-day S&P 500 returns.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth exceeds its trailing 12-month growth and FEDFUNDS is above its 6-month average
evidence_refs: series:CPIAUCSL
series:FEDFUNDS
fact:CPIAUCSL vintage value for 2017-11 was 247.592 before the decision date
fact:FEDFUNDS vintage value for 2017-11 was 1.16 before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if the CPI acceleration and rising FEDFUNDS interaction is followed by positive 20-day returns in more than 60% of triggered cases or if adding the interaction does not improve out-of-sample log loss.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in housing starts signals weakening interest-rate-sensitive demand and future construction activity, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls more than 10% over 3 months
evidence_refs: series:HOUST
fact:HOUST vintage value for 2017-10 was 1290 before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST declines greater than 10% over 3 months are not followed by lower 60-day S&P 500 returns than the unconditional sample mean, or if the triggered hit rate for negative returns is below 45%.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor income and recession risk, causing investors to reduce equity exposure and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: series:UNRATE
fact:UNRATE vintage value for 2017-11 was 4.1 before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if triggered unemployment increases are followed by nonnegative 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 65% of cases or if the average triggered return is not below the unconditional 5-day mean.

mechanism_narrative: When real GDP growth is positive and payroll employment is expanding, synchronized demand and labor income growth support earnings revisions, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth is positive and PAYEMS 3-month growth is positive
evidence_refs: series:GDPC1
series:PAYEMS
fact:GDPC1 vintage value for 2017-07 was 17169.733 before the decision date
fact:PAYEMS vintage value for 2017-11 was 147241 before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive GDPC1 and PAYEMS trigger does not produce a higher 20-day positive-return frequency than the unconditional baseline, or if the interaction coefficient is negative in walk-forward estimation.
